title: Register a new user and land on the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can complete registration and is redirected into the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User into the name field
Fill unique+tc001@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Registration required-field validation
description: Verifies the registration form shows inline validation when submitted with missing required fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Submit the registration form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Login successfully redirects to dashboard after spinner clears
description: Verifies login is possible after auth initialization completes and redirects to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email input to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Login with wrong credentials shows error toast
description: Verifies invalid credentials result in a visible error toast rather than successful navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email input to be visible
Fill in the email field with invalid.user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an error toast is visible

title: Login required-field validation when submitting empty form
description: Verifies the login form displays required validation errors when submitted without input.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email input to be visible
Submit the login form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Password recovery request shows confirmation for valid email format
description: Verifies submitting the password recovery form with a valid email format shows a confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill registered.user@example.com into the email field
Submit the recovery form
Verify a confirmation that reset instructions were sent is visible

title: Password recovery shows error for invalid email format
description: Verifies the password recovery form rejects an invalid email format with a visible error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Submit the recovery form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Dashboard: View monthly overview and interact with controls
description: Verifies the dashboard loads and key monthly overview interactions work: project scoping and month navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a project from the project selector
Navigate to the next month
Verify monthly summary cards are displayed
Verify category and payment method charts are displayed

title: Dashboard: Empty state when no data exists for the selected period
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an empty state and guidance when there are no transactions for the selected scope/period.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Navigate to a different month
Verify an empty state is displayed for the period
Verify guidance for creating the first transactions is displayed

title: Dashboard: Redirect to login when unauthenticated
description: Verifies unauthenticated users are redirected to the login page when attempting to access the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user lands on the login page
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Dashboard: Switch project scope updates the displayed overview
description: Verifies that changing the project selector updates the scoped dashboard view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a project from the project selector
Select a different project from the project selector
Verify monthly summary cards are displayed for the newly selected project
Verify the dashboard charts are displayed for the newly selected project

title: Project Management: Create a new project
description: Verifies a user can create a project and see it appear in the projects list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /projects
Open the create project modal
Fill in the project name field with Project Alpha TC
Select a currency for the project
Submit the create project form
Verify the projects list contains Project Alpha TC

title: Project Management: Edit an existing project
description: Verifies a user can edit a project and see the updated details in the list.

Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /projects
Open the create project modal
Fill in the project name field with Project To Edit TC
Select a currency for the project
Submit the create project form
Open the edit project flow for Project To Edit TC
Fill in the project name field with Project Edited TC
Submit the edit project form
Verify the projects list contains Project Edited TC

title: Project Management: Inline validation when creating project with missing name
description: Verifies the create project form shows validation when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Open the create project modal
Leave the project name field empty
Select a currency for the project
Submit the create project form

title: Project Management: Delete a project and verify it is removed from list
description: Verifies a user can delete a project via confirmation dialog and it disappears from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /projects
Open the create project modal
Fill in the project name field with Project To Delete TC
Select a currency for the project
Submit the create project form
Trigger deletion for Project To Delete TC
Confirm deletion in the dialog
Verify the projects list does not contain Project To Delete TC

title: Create a new project expense from a project detail page
description: Verifies an expense can be created end-to-end and appears in the expenses list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Wait for the email field to be visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to projects
Click a project in the project list to open its details page
Switch to the Expenses tab
Open the new expense form
Fill Expense seed 001 into the title field
Fill 123.45 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Select a category
Select a payment method
Submit the expense form
Verify an expense with title "Expense seed 001" is displayed in the expenses list
